arts.ttl: Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the second half of the 2024/25 Serie A season kicks off, Atalanta will be looking to reclaim their position at the top of the table when they face Udinese at the Bluenergy Stadium on Saturday. This match marks an important opportunity for both teams as they strive to achieve their respective season goals. The post Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Gasperini Seeks Striker Reinforcement: Lucca Targeted from Udinese
arts.sum: Atalanta coach Gian Piero Gasperini has made it clear that he is looking for a new striker during the January transfer window. Following injuries to Mateo Retegui and Gianluca Scamacca, Gasperini is pushing for the club to secure at least one attacking option to bolster their squad for the remainder of the season. The post Atalanta’s Gasperini Seeks Striker Reinforcement: Lucca Targeted from Udinese appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Preview: Udinese vs. Atalanta BC - prediction, team news, lineups
